signals.headline: ELON MUSK TWEET COUNT MARKETS DOMINATE POLYMARKET TRENDING | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
ELON MUSK TWEET COUNT MARKETS DOMINATE POLYMARKET TRENDING | NO | MED confidence**  
Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk tweet predictions**, such as "# tweets in April 2026" (24% odds for 1120-1159 range) and "# tweets April 17-24, 2026" (41% for 220-239 range), with over $21M+ in volume across 129+ live tweet markets[3][4][2].
